import React from "react"; import { CheckCircle2 } from "lucide-react"; const PROJECT_IMG = "https://images.pexels.com/photos/7108785/pexels-photo-7108785.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&dpr=2&h=900&w=1200"; const bullets = [ "Engineered multi-level structural deck with concealed fastening system", "Premium hardwood decking selected for moisture stability & long-term grain integrity", "Custom railing detailing finished to interior cabinetry tolerances", "Coordinated electrical, drainage and grading from day one of layout", ]; export default function ProjectShowcase() { return (
{/* Left: text */}
Flagship Project

Structural integrity, finished to the millimeter.

Our current flagship: a multi-level premium deck designed for decades of performance — underlying engineering executed like a high-rise turnover, surface details executed like furniture.
